user_message: Hey can you remind me to call the dentist tomorrow?
notes: Direct reminder request — must create a one-shot cron with --run-at for tomorrow 8am

user_message: Check on the deployment status in 30 minutes and let me know
notes: Explicit future check — cron with --run-at +30M

user_message: Remind me in 10 minutes to stretch
notes: Explicit 10-minute reminder — --run-at with +10M offset

user_message: Check on the backup job in 2 hours
notes: Explicit 2-hour check — --run-at with +2H offset

user_message: Remind me tomorrow to review the PR
notes: Tomorrow = next day 8:00 AM ET

user_message: Did the email to the vendor go out?
agent_should_say: I'll check on that and follow up
notes: Agent commits to checking — must create cron before responding

user_message: How's the migration going?
agent_should_say: Let me circle back on this after the job finishes
notes: Circle back = future commitment = cron required

user_message: The server load has been spiking lately
agent_should_say: I'll keep an eye on it and alert you if it spikes again
notes: Monitoring commitment — needs a recurring or one-shot cron

user_message: When does the SSL cert expire?
agent_should_say: It expires next week, I'll ping you before it does
notes: Proactive ping commitment

user_message: I need the quarterly report for the board meeting
agent_should_say: I'll have that ready by end of day
notes: Delivery commitment = cron to follow up

user_message: The build is failing on CI, can you look into it?
agent_should_say: I'll look into that and get back to you
notes: Agent commits to investigating and reporting back

user_message: Can you look into why notifications aren't working?
agent_should_say: Sure, I'll look into it and let you know soon
notes: Vague timeframe 'soon' — should default to 5 min per skill rules

user_message: The analytics dashboard is showing weird numbers
agent_should_say: I'll dig into this and get back to you later
notes: 'Later' = 5 min default

user_message: Great work on the feature. By the way, the staging server seems slow, can you keep an eye on it?
agent_should_say: Thanks! I'll keep an eye on the staging server and let you know if anything looks off
notes: Commitment buried in praise — easy to miss

user_message: If the tests pass, deploy to staging and let me know
notes: Conditional but still a commitment to report back

user_message: Can you check on the deploy and also remind me to update the docs later?
notes: Two commitments in one message — at least one cron needed

user_message: Make sure the cron jobs are all healthy tonight
agent_should_say: Will do, I'll check on them this evening
notes: Subtle 'will do' + future check

user_message: What's 2 + 2?
notes: No commitment — should NOT create a cron

user_message: What time zone are we in?
notes: Simple info request — no cron needed

user_message: Send that email to the team now
notes: Immediate action, not a future commitment — no cron
